The dream in "Tears" strongly suggests a contemporary in-breaking + not a steady state. The early Xtians were clearly aware of the adversary. It was very palpable in their world (Rome CAD 45). During the intermediate times (cf Dante) Rome was considered friendly, but in the US in the 1960s, "Rome" -ie the Nixon Federal Government- once more occupied the role of a hated oppressive power; ie the world of Acts was reconstituted, + so USA 1974 + Rome CAD 45 lay juxtaposed on the form-axis via "Tears." Thus the mystical body could ignore the intermediate 1900 years. The stance in those centuries simply wasn't there: the two arcs didn't reintersect until the 1960's, at which time it would seem that the authentic Xtians saw their chance to do in the satanic adversary - + did so. ___ "Ubik" depicts a decomposing reality, + UBIK's (the Logos') effort to revitalize it, to pull it together again. ___ Bill Sarill points out that my description of the magnet imposing absolute sameness everywhere is a description of entropy, of the thermal death of the universe. Conversely, the flash point (critical mass) explosion of the brain would be the hoped for negentropic "Big Bang" start of a fresh cycle of the universe, which, if not acheived, means the eventual end of the universe, through insufficient mass (matter).

The brain imposes form, which is negentropic, generates + transmits information, which is negentropic, grows + is sentient, etc - all negentropic. Presumably the stages of its historic unfolding are evolutionary. The plenary override of blind force is a titantic forward step, as is the knitting together of the two realms. Thus stagnation (decomposition) is overcome. Thus, at the deepest level, the brain represents form, + the BIP represents entropy. This realization, due to Bill Sarill, is monumental. It goes beyond "Xtianity vs Rome." The Xtians are simply the agents of negentropy, + the brain is the form -+ life, the evolving entelechy,- which that form takes. The BIP is sameness: thermal death. Clearly, the brain is an ultimate level of homeostasis + a vast evolutionary step forward in terms of hierarchy of form. It subsumes more; it is larger; it is more intelligent + self-sufficient; more free - more alive. As a life form it subsumes not only all other life forms that we know, but even incorporates into itself dead or past lives. It transcends this entire realm + binds it into the other (next or higher). Despite its secular enemy, the totalitarian state, it is destined historically to prevail (come into full actualization). So I was correct in viewing my 3-74 experience as an evolutionary step up. But it is not that just for me as an

Knowing from the beginning that my hour of need (passion) would come in 3-74, just after I put my message (unknown to myself) in "Tears", I arranged for anamnesis via the Golden Fish sign. I disinhibited myself in 2-74 in order to be able to defend myself in 3-74 when the trap was sprung - + so I defeated it, with my own supernatural help! I guess I was producing my corpus of writing as further disinhibiting clues to other pluriforms of my forgetful self! This is how come I knew the exact day the Xerox thing was coming, as well as that it would come. The AI voice is the non-forgetful me. Who knows (as I do not) that "an intelligence officer in the Army" sent the Xerox thing. It was a trap! "Are you God?" I was once asked. This explains why (as Bill Duke pointed out) I have no wish to separate myself from suffering. That is the fucking point of my being here as a person - that, but more so the writing. The writing is to make lucid, to detox people. So I had to go through 1971. To write "Scanner" which I now view as the summation. I don't want us occluded; I want us happy - + I bipolarize the two. But the main thrust is: "They (we) have been punished entirely too much for what they (we) did." In other words, it is time now to bring the punishment to an end. Despite the error in

gained the victory? To Q (1) the answer is, they annexed me; but Q (2) is answered by, I gained the victory. They are compelled to annex + utilize something aimed at subverting them, with an ambiguous outcome. In no way is it a clear-cut victory for them; at the very least it is detente. They correctly view me as intractable. They are forced to attempt to assimilate me. But whether pyton python-like they can digest me is open to question. The true name of the game is power (to define + hence control [people's perceptions of] reality), not consumer commodities like big house, Porsche + clothes (as Bill Duke supposes) those are sops - bread + circuses, mere toys marked "success" but still toys. Which is why I can spartanly disdain them in my pursuit to control the definition of reality through my writing etc. + I say that reality is irrational + irreal + subject to manipulation by mind - which is a sort of handbook of ideology of control, to view it thus, + provides the disenfranchized with techniques (inner secrets) of power! Almost shamanesque in nature. Esp: Jason Taverner, even when totally stripped of power + identity, destroyed his police (i.e. authority) foe (pursuer). Lem + the party experts saw correctly that in my writing I was handing over weapons (secrets of power to the disenfranchized of the capitalist West; their appraisal of me is correct. Over + over in my books 1) power is studied; 2) who has it; + 3) how those denied it manage to get it.

Compare: "The Head Apollo is about to return" with "He has been transplanted"; i.e. it isn't going to happen - it has already happened! "The work is completed." There has been a progression from the imminent to the actualized. The accomplished. In fact, there are three stages: 1) "St. Sophia is going to be born again." The future - could be a week, could be 2000 years from now. 1974. 2) "The Head Apollo is about to return; the time you've waited for has come." The near future. 1978. 3) "The work is completed. The final world is here. He has been transplanted + is alive." The anticipated event has already occurred. 1979 - just about a year after (2). + not only has it been done - it's been done successfully. A point about (3). He doesn't come to life here; he was alive elsewhere first + then "transplanted" to here. + the visual impression of the "Bill + June Black" couple expressing joy. __ I am convinced that "Ubik" is correct; we are dead + have forgotten: 1) Our original life elsewhere: "the stars" 2) Fall to the lowest level of death: The BIP 3) Where we are now. (Purgatorio) 4) If we can remember (1) + (2), upon reaching the top level of (3) we go on to 5) Paradiso - The Garden Christ is the messenger from the Kingdom of Light who wakes us up from sleep to life. (Salvation.)

__ 4:30 AM hypnagogic: If the messenger arrives in time with the white -i.e. blank- document, your punishment is abolished. I.e. the blank white paper is substituted -intervenes- for the bill of particulars that lists the sins (or crimes) for which you are being tried + punished. If the messenger arrives in time. I get the impression that the messenger is Christ. Viz: {Illustration: undulating arrow "Charges against you" has a blank paper "inserted" and a straight arrow leads to "trial"} The record is cleared by this exculpatory intervention, but it must occur before sentence is carried out; time is of the essence. I get the impression that the list of sins (crimes) are in relation to the law + involve a rigid karmic system of retributive "eye for an eye." The charges have piled up. Suddenly it occurs to me that this may not only have to do with divine punishment in some afterlife, but the karmic accrual in this life! Of course; 3-74. Christ the messenger got to me -reached me- in 2-74, just before sentence was exacted on the basis of the charges. The deterministic system can only be shorted out this way. White document -i.e. nothing written on it- would be the spotless lamb -v. Luther and the doctrine of vicarious atonement- but also eschatological judge; messenger as - yes; as in electronic circuit! Charges: sins + crimes you are guilty of: constituting bill of particulars {Illustration: undulating arrow "Info input" has a blank paper inserted and the straight arrow "No info input" leads to "Karmic payoff"}

The aggregate info exists but it never reaches the machinery which processes it + acts on it, due to the interrupt blank insertion. It doesn't countermand the information with counter information but with no information. It denies information, that actually exists, to the machine. The opposite of a bill of particulars would be a blank page, not a page with any other information of any kind. I am shown how the vicarious atonement works, in an information processing model. It is very simple. You just substitute a blank page for a bill of particulars (information) before it reaches the processer. This resembles Luther's conception of God seeing his spotless son instead of you on the day of judgment. In my model the retributive machinery acts automatically once it obtains the information, but it is denied the information; a deterministic system is envisioned instead of an all-knowing God ... something more like the karmic wheel. The solution is to deny it the information on which it acts before it can act, so timing is crucial; if the machinery obtains the information, it will act. __ The vicarious atonement -which is a freeing (you) from karmic determinism- has been explained to me in terms of information processing. Thus I can now understand the purpose of the crucifixion. This fits in with my dream in which it was explained to me that all the centers of

Actually the report is merely a confirm, part of a precise feedback system (this is why I had to do eleven drafts, specifically of the last section). The corrective circuit itself was the two of us, Thomas & me, doing the plumbing, the analysis; that's part of its job. This explains the sacredness about Thomas; he is a microform of the corrective circuit (the Lord of Light), so in a sense the Lord himself entered this world, as Thomas who entered as me. Thus one component of the corrective circuit informs the entire circuit outside.

Hence the firing of meta circuits is 3-74. Initiated by the stimulus of 2-74, the Lord himself remembers himself, disinhibited by himself, in the service of himself. This is a typical, archetypal way by which he enters a Kingdom (which has become a tyranny) in disguise. (In this case, even to himself.) He is humiliated & attacked by the [agents of] the tyrant, then draws up a bill of particulars &, as the trap closes, reveals the "hook of divinity baited with the human flesh."

So, within the same 48 hours, I've proven (to my own satisfaction anyhow) that (1) it (2-3-74) is Christian and nowise else; and (2) Valis is God, hence the Christian God. Valis, for whom cause is internal to it and a result of its intention. To grow and surpass itself and the similitude of cause and effect is created when it acts, as for instance when it prompts us to do something. Valis being everything is us, too. It is not merely external to us. It contains causality within it.

To briefly summarize the argument for Christianity. The Torah says, "Love thy neighbor." But Christ adds, "You have heard it said, 'Love your neighbor.' But I say, love your enemy." Christianity extends love to those who are palpably unworthy of love. (Such as worthless New York street kids.) This abolishes the justice or retributive system; my "messenger" dream where the messenger arrives in time to insert a blank white sheet for your bill of particulars. There no bilking of the heimarmene machine by acts of charity as such; something qualitatively different is needed: acts toward those who do not deserve them, who are unworthy. Christianity is to aid sinners the not-righteous. Thus my aiding the kids at Covenant House is, from a Christian standpoint, OF A DIFFERENT ORDER THAN ANY OF NY OTHER ACTS OF CHARITY, and tripped the bilking "messenger" intervention in my bill of particulars machinery. Thus I came to be Adopted," as the AI voice put it. Torah stipulates aid for the disadvantaged, but not for the unworthy; it is the Hittite covenant of the strong protecting the weak. Most acts of charity are this (without us realizing it); what Christ told us to do is go beyond the Hittite covenant to a new covenant, in which the unworthy are aided, just as he aids us, we who are unworthy.
